response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and demonstrates deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest equivalents), and architecture — plus notable open-source contributions and cross-language proficiency (Java, Kotlin, DLang). His product-focused work and communication skills via workshops further support fit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker across multiple enterprises
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow development experience aligned with required skills
Strong open-source contributions and demonstrated leadership in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent frameworks are used
German language skill is only basic, may impact collaboration in Berlin-based team
Some roles involve legacy or niche tech (DLang, Ember.js); need to confirm modern stack adaptability
